zh.lifeSummary: Abigail Burbank於1363年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦。她於1379年與Sir Hugh Moodye Jr在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Abigail Burbank于1363年出生在英国英格兰倫敦。她于1379年与Sir Hugh Moodye Jr在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Burbank
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, perhaps from Burbank House in Dacre, Cumbria, possibly named with Old English burh ‘stronghold, manor’ + Old Danish banke ‘bank, ridge’.

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: Abigail Burbank was born in 1363, in London, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir Hugh Moodye Jr in 1379, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Abigail Burbank est née en 1363, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh Moodye Jr en 1379, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Abigail Burbank wurde 1363 in London, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1379 in London, England Sir Hugh Moodye Jr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Abigail Burbank è nata il nel 1363 nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Sir Hugh Moodye Jr nel 1379, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.London, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスロンドン
ja.lifeSummary: Abigail Burbankは1363年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで生まれた。1379年にイギリスロンドンでSir Hugh Moodye Jrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Burbank(은)는 1363년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1379년 영국 런던에서 Sir Hugh Moodye Jr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Abigail Burbank nasceu em 1363, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh Moodye Jr em 1379, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Abigail Burbank родилась в 1363 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh Moodye Jr в 1379 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Abigail Burbank nació en 1363, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Sir Hugh Moodye Jr en 1379, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
